summary: Evaluations and interviews - time per stage in events report
description: DEPRECATED - This endpoint is deprecated and will be discontinued by the end of 2024.

params.name: format
params.description: Used for exporting in different format than json, can be: csv

params.name: limit
params.description: Limit number of results, default is unlimited

params.name: group_by
params.description: Group results by field, can be: job, departament, team_member, role, month, location

params.name: sort_by
params.description: Sort results by field, can be: group, calendar_events_count, phone_screen_time, interview_time, evaluation_time, offer_time, hire_time

params.name: date_start
params.description: Used when date_range is ‘range’. Date from which data should be fetched. Should be in format ‘2014-01-30’.

params.name: date_end
params.description: Used when date_range is ‘range’. Date to which data should be fetched. Should be in format ‘2014-01-30’.

params.name: sort_order
params.description: Sort order, can be: asc, desc (default: desc)

params.name: page
params.description: Page number used for pagination, can be used only with the limit option (1, 2, 3, 4…)

params.name: date_range
params.description: Date filter. Can be: range, today, yesterday, this_week, last_week, this_month, last_month, this_quarter, last_quarter, this_year, last_year, last_30_days, last_60_days. If value is range, additional parameters ‘date_start’ and ‘date_end’ must be provided.

example_request:
GET /c/{company_id}/report/evaluations_and_interviews/time_per_stage

Required params: company_id

Optional params: format, filters, limit, group_by, sort_by, date_start, date_end, sort_order
